## Release Checklist

- [ ] PR title starts with `feat:` for new functionality or `fix:` for a correction.
- [ ] Updated `src/config/release.js` using the version policy in `README.md`.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` with the visible change.
- [ ] Updated `ROADMAP.md` delivery status when planned or in-review work ships.
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/check.mjs` and `node --test`.
- [ ] Reviewed the Vercel Preview at desktop and mobile sizes before merge.
